name: HNS_SPILL_REL_EVT_DETAIL
description: HNS_SPILL_REL_EVT_DETAIL . This table stores Spill Event related data.

columns.Name: SPILL_REL_EVT_DETAIL_ID
columns.Comments: SPILL_REL_EVT_DETAIL_ID unique identifier. Primary key for HNS_SPILL_REL_EVT_DETAIL table.

columns.Name: INCIDENT_DETAIL_ID
columns.Comments: Incident Detail identifier. Foreign key for HNS_INCIDENTS_DETAIL table.

columns.Name: SPILL_RELEASE_CODE
columns.Comments: Spill Release Identifier. This column is related to Spill / Release incident event type.

columns.Name: WHAT_WAS_SPILLED_OR_RELEASED
columns.Comments: What was spilled or released.

columns.Name: SPILLKIT_DEPLOYED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Spill kit deployed flag. This column is related to spill/release incident event.

columns.Name: REPLN_SPILL_KIT_FLAG
columns.Comments: Replenish Spill Kit Flag. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.YES_NO.

columns.Name: CLEANUP_TEAM_NOTIFIED
columns.Comments: Cleanup team notified flag. This column is related to Spill/ Release incident event.

columns.Name: CLEANUP_TEAM_NOTIFIED_AT
columns.Comments: At what time Cleanup team or Contractor notified.

columns.Name: SPILL_POSSIBLE_CAUSE_CODE
columns.Comments: Possible cause of the spill or release. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_SPILL_POSSIBLE_CAUSE.

columns.Name: SPILL_SOURCE_CODE
columns.Comments: Spill or release source. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_SPILL_SOURCE.

columns.Name: AMOUNT_SPILLED
columns.Comments: Amount in volume spilled during the incident.. This column is related to Spill/Relase incident event.

columns.Name: AMOUNT_SPILLED_UNIT_CD
columns.Comments: Unit of measurement for Amount spilled.

columns.Name: AMOUNT_RECOVERED
columns.Comments: Amount in volume recovred during the event. This column is related to Spill/Release incident event.

columns.Name: AMOUNT_RECOVERED_UNIT_CD
columns.Comments: Unit of measurement for Amount recovered.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: DELETED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Deleted flag.This column signifies whether the incident event is checked for deletion.
